strategy: Classic Darkmoor team fight (14,700, Sun). She takes +30% from Ice and Death. Hitters use Ice or Death.

Do NOT blade or cast globals: either makes her Scald the whole team (999 Fire over 3 rounds), and pet spells trigger it too. Feed the hitter with enchants and auras, or blade only in the same round as the hit.
Do NOT single-trap her; she counters with Assail (850 Myth plus two +35% Myth traps on you). Multi-target traps like Windstorm do NOT trigger it.
Do NOT kill her Darkmoor Gargoyle early: defeating a minion triggers Eternal Leviathan (777) and revives the minion. Save the minion for your final AoE.

She heals 750 each round (Minor Blessing) and runs 5-round school cycles that dump a full spear, blade, and hit package on the highest-threat wizard every fifth round. Use Doom and Gloom or Infection to cut her healing and manage threat.
Supports blade the hitter same-round or via enchants, the healer covers the Scald and cycle hits, and the hitter lands one big Ice or Death AoE to take her and the revived Gargoyle together.
cheatNotes: Casting a blade or a global makes her Scald the whole team for 999 Fire over 3 rounds. Blade only in the same round you hit, or use enchants instead of blades.
Pet-cast spells also trigger the Scald. Consider a pet that will not cast during setup.
A single-target trap on her triggers Assail: 850 Myth and two +35% Myth traps back on you. Trap with multi-target spells instead.
Multi-target traps like Windstorm do NOT trigger the Assail. Use those if you must trap her.
Killing a minion makes her cast Eternal Leviathan (777) and revive the minion. Do not pick off the Gargoyle early; take it with your final AoE.
Each cycle round she Pierces a random wizard. Expect steady pierce damage.
On the fifth round of the Myth cycle she loads Mythspear, Mythblade, Mystic Colossus, and Saga of Heroes. Heal the highest-threat wizard through it.
She heals 750 every round with Minor Blessing. Use Doom and Gloom or Infection to cut it.
On the fifth round of the Life cycle she dumps Lifespear, Lifeblade, Namaste, and Hungry Caterpillar on the highest-threat wizard. Manage threat and pre-shield.
Each round of the Fire cycle she Backdrafts a random wizard for her pip count. Expect the trap and heal through the Fire follow-up.
On the fifth round of the Fire cycle she loads Firespear, Fireblade, Combustion, and Fire from Above on the highest-threat wizard. Shield and heal that wizard.
